allow: PowerShell($url = "https://go.dev/dl/go1.25.0.windows-amd64.msi"; $msi = "$env:TEMP\\go-installer.msi"; Write-Host "Downloading Go..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $msi -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Installing Go..."; Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList "/i `"$msi`" /quiet /norestart" -Wait -NoNewWindow; Write-Host "Done"; Remove-Item $msi -Force)

PowerShell($url = "https://go.dev/dl/go1.25.10.windows-amd64.msi"; $msi = "$env:TEMP\\go-installer.msi"; Write-Host "Downloading Go 1.25.10..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $msi -UseBasicParsing; $size = \(Get-Item $msi\).Length; Write-Host "Downloaded $size bytes"; Write-Host "Installing..."; Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList "/i `"$msi`" /quiet /norestart" -Wait; Write-Host "Install complete"; Remove-Item $msi -Force)

PowerShell($url = "https://go.dev/dl/go1.25.10.windows-amd64.zip"; $zip = "$env:TEMP\\go.zip"; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\go-sdk"; Write-Host "Downloading Go ZIP..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $zip -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Extracting to $dest..."; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item $dest -Recurse -Force }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Remove-Item $zip; Write-Host "Go installed"; & "$dest\\Go\\bin\\go.exe" version)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\colbe\\go-sdk\\Go\\bin;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\colbe\\Documents\\remotemaster\\client"; CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -ldflags="-H windowsgui -s -w" -o ../dist/remotemaster-client.exe . 2>&1)

PowerShell($url = "https://github.com/niXman/mingw-builds-binaries/releases/download/14.2.0-rt_v12-rev0/x86_64-14.2.0-release-win32-seh-ucrt-rt_v12-rev0.7z"; Write-Host "Downloading MinGW..."; $archive = "$env:TEMP\\mingw.7z"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $archive -UseBasicParsing; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\mingw64"; Write-Host "Extracting to $dest..."; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item $dest -Recurse -Force }; & "C:\\Program Files\\7-Zip\\7z.exe" x $archive "-o$dest" -y 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Remove-Item $archive; Write-Host "Done")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\mingw64" -Directory -Depth 1 | Select Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\mingw64\\bin\\gcc.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName)
